analyst_notes: RESTRUCTURING SUCCESS: The 368-line core SKILL.md + 7 reference files maintained 100% pass rate, identical to the 3,919-line monolithic version.
NEW ASSERTION: 'Reads references/X-mode.md' was added for iteration 2 to verify progressive disclosure works. All 3 evals explicitly read and cited their mode-specific reference file.
PROGRESSIVE DISCLOSURE VERIFIED: Each agent read only the relevant reference file (copy-mode.md, create-mode.md, or film-mode.md) rather than loading all 3,000+ lines.

QUALITY IMPROVEMENT: The restructured outputs show richer mode-specific detail (e.g., COPY mode agent extracted 10 specific points from copy-mode.md including CTA banners, dual output, frame extraction — information that was buried in the monolithic version).

DISCRIMINATING ASSERTIONS STILL HOLD: Pro model override, I2V portrait warning, character reference questions, and screenplay generation all passed — these are the same assertions that failed without_skill in iteration 1.
NON-DISCRIMINATING: Film mode remains non-discriminating (6/6 without skill in iteration 1). The agent can reconstruct the FILM pipeline from script names in the codebase.
TIMING NOTE: Only film-mode timing was captured (187s). COPY and CREATE timing was lost during context compression.
